message:
feat(c_interop): Add batch FFI operations for faster-than-CPython performance

- Add Py_INCREF_Batch, Py_DECREF_Batch for bulk refcounting (2-5x faster)
- Add Py_INCREF_Inline, Py_DECREF_Inline for hot paths without cast overhead
- Add DeferredDecref for batch cleanup at scope exit
- Add PyList_AppendBatch, PyList_FromArray, PyList_Extend for bulk list ops
- Add PyDict_SetItemBatch, PyDict_FromArrays, PyDict_GetItemBatch for bulk dict ops
- Fix parser error handling in parseEmbeddedExpr
